text:
Hey, I'm Prakash. Welcome to Greenfield — a podcast about engineering, AI, and the businesses we build from scratch. Broadcasting from Kathmandu.

[short pause]

Here's the thing. You've corrected your coding agent the same way three times this week. Barrel imports. The test that sneaks an "any" through. The migration that ships without a backfill. The rule lives in your head — until you write it down.

[excited] So write it down! A prompt for the rule. A hook to block the diff. A subagent to audit the rest of the repo. A skill to call the whole workflow by name.

One starter repo. One planted bug. Four artifacts you keep.

Greenfield. Episode one. Let's build it.
